positive: A symmetrical, minimalist illustration featuring a stylized geometric mountain range at sunset. The mountains should be depicted with clean, sharp silhouettes in deep indigo and burnt orange tones, contrasted against a sky gradient of dusty rose and pale gold. Incorporate subtle celestial elements like a crescent moon and three small, stylized stars. The composition should be balanced and highly decorative, suitable for a central, repeat apparel print. Vector art style, high contrast, clean lines, flat graphic design, intricate linework, perfect symmetry, centered composition.
